nasb.text: Therefore the showers have been withheld, And there has been no spring rain. Yet you had a harlot’s forehead; You refused to be ashamed.

esv.text: Therefore the showers have been withheld, and the spring rain has not come; yet you have the forehead of a whore; you refuse to be ashamed.

cnv.text: 所以甘霖停止， 春雨不降； 你還是一副妓女的面孔， 不顧羞恥。

ccb.text: 因此，秋雨不降， 春雨不来。 你却仍然不知羞耻， 一副娼妓的嘴脸。
